hook.text: UNITED HANDED EASIEST START IN THE LEAGUE

beats.text: HULL CITY AWAY IS THE OPENING DAY FIXTURE
THEN IPSWICH AT HOME — TWO PROMOTED SIDES
THE FIRST MANCHESTER DERBY COMES ON SEPTEMBER 12

caption: The fixtures are OUT 🔴 Manchester United have been handed what analysts are calling the easiest opening to a Premier League season — starting away at Hull City on August 22, before hosting fellow promoted side Ipswich Town at Old Trafford. The first Manchester derby is on September 12, and United are back in the Champions League. An incredible new era starts now. Who are you most excited to face in 2026/27? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football
